case_title: INTERIOR DESIGN WORKS, LTD DBA SIEMATIC VS MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY INTERIOR DESIGN WORKS, LTD DBA SIEMATIC AS TO DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERIOR DESIGN WORKS, LTD DBA SIEMATIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC. $2,549.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,564.00, PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE WAS PERSUASIVE AS TO DEF'S DEFECTIVE WORK & RESULTING DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22517, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERIOR DESIGN WORKS, LTD DBA SIEMATIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC. $3,727.15 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,742.15, JUDG.ENTERED ON 7/14/93 IN SUP.CT.SCA 22517. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,807.40 AS TO DEFENDANT MARBLE SYSTEM INSTALLATION, INC.
